# Get loss values for each step in the model fitting process

`get_loss()` returns a data frame of loss values. Each row corresponds
to a step in the fitting process.

## Usage

``` r
get_loss(bf)
```

## Arguments

- bf:

  A BirdFlow object.

## Value

A data frame with columns:

- dist:

  The distance loss

- ent:

  The entropy loss

- obs:

  The observation loss

- total:

  The total weighted loss

## See also

[`plot_loss()`](https://birdflow-science.github.io/BirdFlowR/reference/plot_loss.md)

## Examples

``` r
bf <- BirdFlowModels::amewoo
get_loss(bf)
#>          dist       ent        obs     total

#> 2   210.01872 236.22165 0.52866054 2.0061350
```
